_note: Real-life head-coaching career records for the coaches this tool imports (the generic placeholders EA ships — see GENERIC_FILLS in build-dataset.mjs). Keyed by coach name (First Last). wins/losses are OVERALL COLLEGE career HC record from Wikipedia's 'List of current NCAA Division I FBS football coaches', current through the 2025 season (July 2026) — the era CFB27 reflects. Note: the game's coach-stats field tracks COLLEGE coaching only, so Bill Belichick's record here is his UNC college record (4-8), not his NFL career. Absent fields are left unwritten (the coach keeps EA's value), never fabricated.
